title: Fluffy Fudgy Slovakian Polenta Bake
description: A dense and sweet one-pot Slovakian dish, perfect for a dessert or snack. Made with canola oil and egg-free-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: Egg Replacer
ingredients.notes: Such as flaxseed or chia seeds.

ingredients.name: Raisins
ingredients.notes: Optional, but adds sweetness and texture.

instructions: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees Celsius (350 degrees Fahrenheit).
In a large mixing bowl, combine the maize flour, granulated sugar, canola oil, and egg replacer. Mix until well combined.
Add the milk, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon. Mix until smooth.
Add the raisins and vanilla, if using. Mix until well combined.
Pour in the water and honey, if using. Mix until the batter is smooth.
Transfer the batter to a greased and floured 20x20-centimeter (8x8-inch) baking dish.
Bake for 40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
Serve warm, or at room temperature.
Store leftovers in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 3 days.
Reheat in the microwave or oven, as needed.
